problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electromagnetic. Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
